audience.description: Who you're pitching to: investors, board, client, team, or partner

ask.description: What you want the audience to do (e.g. 'approve budget', 'sign contract', 'join us')

description: Structure findings as a persuasive Situation-Complication-Resolution narrative, delivered as a Word document (.docx) — reads workspace evidence, applies lens concern self-assessment, builds argument from researched data. Evidence JSON on disk + professional document delivery.
usage: make the case for, sell this idea, persuasive narrative, convince stakeholders, pitch this, make a presentation, pitch deck content, one-pager
